1419.name: Uniswap v3 (Optimism)
1419.description:
## What Is Uniswap (V3) (Optimism)?

Uniswap is the largest decentralized trading and automated market-making protocol on Ethereum. Uniswap (V3) (Optimism) is the third iteration of the decentralized cryptocurrency exchange ([DEX](https://coinmarketcap.com/alexandria/glossary/decentralized-exchange-dex)). The platform introduced the concept of [concentrated liquidity](https://coinmarketcap.com/alexandria/glossary/concentrated-liquidity), which improves the liquidity providing efficiency and makes it easier for some assets to gain exposure.
